---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What is currently difficult?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Context

- Which stage or package does this relate to? (M1-M5 methodology, qf-pipeline, qti-core)
- Are you a teacher, researcher, or developer?
- How does this fit the "scaffolding, not automation" philosophy — the teacher authors, the tool structures?
